Response when camera is outside setup time and admin password Set: 
0000   ff ff ff ff ff ff d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 08 00 45 00
0010   01 f9 4a 9f 40 00 40 11 2c 48 c0 a8 01 65 ff ff
0020   ff ff 29 ad 29 ad 01 e5 de eb 00 01 01 a9 00 0e
0030   d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 a0 29 19 3e ab 91 c0 a8 01 79
0040   00 00 20 11 1e 11 23 1f 1e 19 13 00 00 02 02 02
0050   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 02 00
0060   01 00 01 00 00 20 00 04 c0 a8 01 65 00 21 00 04
0070   ff ff ff 00 00 22 00 04 c0 a8 01 fe 00 23 00 08
0080   08 08 08 08 08 08 04 04 00 25 00 02 01 bb 00 40
0090   00 10 fe 80 00 00 00 00 00 00 d6 2d c5 ff fe 2a
00a0   8d 13 00 41 00 10 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00b0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 42 00 20 00 00 00 00 00 00
00c0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00d0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 44 00 02 01 bb
00e0   00 45 00 02 00 40 00 a0 00 04 c0 a8 01 65 00 a1
00f0   00 04 ff ff ff 00 00 a2 00 04 c0 a8 01 fe 00 a3
0100   00 08 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 a4 00 04 00 00
0110   00 00 00 a6 00 01 94 00 a7 00 10 57 56 2d 58 32
0120   32 37 30 30 2d 56 32 4c 00 00 00 00 a8 00 10 58
0130   32 32 37 30 30 2d 56 32 4c 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0140   a9 00 10 33 2e 36 37 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0150   00 00 00 00 aa 00 10 30 2e 30 30 00 00 00 00 00
0160   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 b1 00 28 00 00 00 00 00
0170   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0180   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0190   00 00 00 00 b2 00 28 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
01a0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
01b0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
01c0   b4 00 02 00 01 00 b5 00 01 00 00 b6 00 01 90 00
01d0   d0 00 10 53 32 32 37 30 30 2d 56 32 4c 00 00 00
01e0   00 00 00 00 d1 00 10 58 42 56 33 30 34 36 33 00
01f0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 d3 00 02 00 01 00 d2 00
0200   02 00 02 ff ff 3d af

Response when camera is inside setup time and admin password Set:
0000   ff ff ff ff ff ff d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 08 00 45 00
0010   01 f9 6c cd 40 00 40 11 0a 1a c0 a8 01 65 ff ff
0020   ff ff 29 ad 29 ad 01 e5 e0 eb 00 01 01 a9 00 0e
0030   d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 a0 29 19 3e ab 91 c0 a8 01 79
0040   00 00 20 11 1e 11 23 1f 1e 19 13 00 00 02 02 02
0050   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 02 00
0060   01 00 01 00 00 20 00 04 c0 a8 01 65 00 21 00 04
0070   ff ff ff 00 00 22 00 04 c0 a8 01 fe 00 23 00 08
0080   08 08 08 08 08 08 04 04 00 25 00 02 01 bb 00 40
0090   00 10 fe 80 00 00 00 00 00 00 d6 2d c5 ff fe 2a
00a0   8d 13 00 41 00 10 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00b0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 42 00 20 00 00 00 00 00 00
00c0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00d0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 44 00 02 01 bb
00e0   00 45 00 02 00 40 00 a0 00 04 c0 a8 01 65 00 a1
00f0   00 04 ff ff ff 00 00 a2 00 04 c0 a8 01 fe 00 a3
0100   00 08 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 a4 00 04 00 00
0110   00 00 00 a6 00 01 94 00 a7 00 10 57 56 2d 58 32
0120   32 37 30 30 2d 56 32 4c 00 00 00 00 a8 00 10 58
0130   32 32 37 30 30 2d 56 32 4c 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0140   a9 00 10 33 2e 36 37 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0150   00 00 00 00 aa 00 10 30 2e 30 30 00 00 00 00 00
0160   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 b1 00 28 00 00 00 00 00
0170   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0180   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0190   00 00 00 00 b2 00 28 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
01a0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
01b0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
01c0   b4 00 02 00 00 00 b5 00 01 00 00 b6 00 01 90 00
01d0   d0 00 10 53 32 32 37 30 30 2d 56 32 4c 00 00 00
01e0   00 00 00 00 d1 00 10 58 42 56 33 30 34 36 33 00
01f0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 d3 00 02 00 01 00 d2 00
0200   02 00 02 ff ff 3d ae

Response when camera is inside setup time and admin password not Set:
0000   ff ff ff ff ff ff d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 08 00 45 00
0010   01 f9 85 99 40 00 40 11 f1 4d c0 a8 01 65 ff ff
0020   ff ff 29 ad 29 ad 01 e5 e1 ec 00 01 01 a9 00 0e
0030   d4 2d c5 2a 8d 13 a0 29 19 3e ab 91 c0 a8 01 79
0040   00 00 20 11 1e 11 23 1f 1e 19 13 00 00 02 02 01
0050   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 02 00
0060   01 00 01 00 00 20 00 04 c0 a8 01 65 00 21 00 04
0070   ff ff ff 00 00 22 00 04 c0 a8 01 fe 00 23 00 08
0080   08 08 08 08 08 08 04 04 00 25 00 02 01 bb 00 40
0090   00 10 fe 80 00 00 00 00 00 00 d6 2d c5 ff fe 2a
00a0   8d 13 00 41 00 10 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00b0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 42 00 20 00 00 00 00 00 00
00c0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
00d0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 44 00 02 01 bb
00e0   00 45 00 02 00 40 00 a0 00 04 c0 a8 01 65 00 a1
00f0   00 04 ff ff ff 00 00 a2 00 04 c0 a8 01 fe 00 a3
0100   00 08 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 a4 00 04 00 00
0110   00 00 00 a6 00 01 94 00 a7 00 10 57 56 2d 58 32
0120   32 37 30 30 2d 56 32 4c 00 00 00 00 a8 00 10 58
0130   32 32 37 30 30 2d 56 32 4c 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0140   a9 00 10 33 2e 36 37 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0150   00 00 00 00 aa 00 10 30 2e 30 30 00 00 00 00 00
0160   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 b1 00 28 00 00 00 00 00
0170   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0180   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
0190   00 00 00 00 b2 00 28 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
01a0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
01b0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
01c0   b4 00 02 00 00 00 b5 00 01 00 00 b6 00 01 90 00
01d0   d0 00 10 53 32 32 37 30 30 2d 56 32 4c 00 00 00
01e0   00 00 00 00 d1 00 10 58 42 56 33 30 34 36 33 00
01f0   00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 d3 00 02 00 01 00 d2 00
0200   02 00 02 ff ff 3d ad
